name: Arcadia Biosciences, Inc.
business: Arcadia sells Zola coconut water products, available in original, original with pulp, espresso, and pineapple flavors. The products are sourced from Thailand and sold through grocery retailers and foodservice distributors across the U.S.

exposures.sentence: Since acquiring the assets of Zola in May 2021, Arcadia has provided consumers with a way to rehydrate, reset, and reenergize with Zola coconut water products.
